section_name: Matters not to be evidence in civil suits.
text:
Any action taken by the department pursuant to NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, the findings, if any, of the department upon which the action is based and the security filed pursuant to NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, are privileged against disclosure at the trial of any action at law to recover damages.

NONPAYMENT OF JUDGMENT
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.300 — Matters not to be evidence in civil suits.

Any action taken by the department pursuant to NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, the findings, if any, of the department upon which the action is based and the security filed pursuant to NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, are privileged against disclosure at the trial of any action at law to recover damages.

NONPAYMENT OF JUDGMENT

subsections.text: Any action taken by the department pursuant to NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, the findings, if any, of the department upon which the action is based and the security filed pursuant to NRS 485.190 to 485.300 , inclusive, are privileged against disclosure at the trial of any action at law to recover damages.
